testcase.name: should return matching chain ID from opcode and network provider
should deploy contract at deterministic address matching CREATE2 calculation

testcase.classname: EIP-145 Bitwise Shift Operations Basic Shift Operations
testcase.name: should execute SHL (Shift Left) operation with correct result
should reject peg-in with malformed locking script
testcase.failure: AssertionError: expected '0x' to equal '0x01' at Context.<anonymous> (/repo/test/token-bridge/BridgeTest.ts:142:8) at processTicksAndRejections (node:internal/process/task_queues:95:5)

testcase.name: executes PUSH0 in a constant-folded context
